texto: Whether women work in the care sector because the wages are low or whether wages are low because women work there is a question that cannot be answered. But we know that a big reason for economic inequality is that women to a much greater extent work with care.

texto: The laws of the solar system that previously only God had known could suddenly be read using scientific method. The view of the world changed. From one where God intervened, had opinions, smote, parted oceans, moved mountains and personally opened millions of flowers every day. To one where God was absent and the universe was a clock that he had created and wound up, but that now ticked of its own accord.

texto: Extreme inequality and financial crisis usually coincide. But the elite who cause it usually come out OK. And they are usually man.

texto: Actually, the idea of economic man is an efficient way of excluding women. We have historically allocated women certain activities and said that she must do them because she is a woman. Then we create an economic theory that states that these activities have no economic meaning.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Katrine Marçal sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Actually, the idea of economic man is an efficient way of excluding women. We have historically a…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, economics, feminism, útil em momentos de feminism.
